ddls:
CREATE TABLE "networks" (
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of the network */,
  "mean_distance_directed" REAL /* Mean distance in directed graphs */,
  "mean_distance_undirected" REAL /* Mean distance in undirected graphs */,
  "transitivity" REAL /* Transitivity of the network */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the network was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the network */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the network data */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of network (e.g., social, biological, infrastructure) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the network */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the network data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nodes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the network the node belongs to */,
  "node_status" TEXT /* Status of the node (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "node_value" REAL /* Value associated with the node (could represent weights) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the node was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the node */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label or name of the node */,
  "attributes" TEXT /* Additional attributes of the node (e.g., age, gender) */,
  "degree" INTEGER /* Degree of the node (number of edges connected to it) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nodes_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "edges" (
  "edge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each edge */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the network the edge belongs to */,
  "start_node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the starting node */,
  "end_node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ending node */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the edge */,
  "edge_type" TEXT /* Type of edge (e.g., solid, dashed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the edge was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the edge */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label or name of the edge */,
  "attributes" TEXT /* Additional attributes of the edge (e.g., type of relationship) */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction of the edge (e.g., directed, undirected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("edge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_edges_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the network the metrics apply to */,
  "largest_clique" INTEGER /* Size of the largest clique in the network */,
  "num_nodes" INTEGER /* Total number of nodes in the network */,
  "num_edges" INTEGER /* Total number of edges in the network */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metrics were calculated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the metrics */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm used to calculate the metrics */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments on the metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "centrality" (
  "centrality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each centrality entry */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the network the centrality applies to */,
  "centrality_index" REAL /* Centrality index value */,
  "centrality_dummy" REAL /* Dummy variable for centrality calculations related to specific conditions (e.g., pandemic) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the centrality metrics were calculated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the centrality metrics */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm used to calculate the centrality */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of centrality metric (e.g., degree, betweenness, closeness) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("centrality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_centrality_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assortativity" (
  "assortativity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assortativity entry */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the network the assortativity applies to */,
  "assortativity_valence" REAL /* Assortativity based on valence */,
  "assortativity_degree" REAL /* Assortativity based on degree */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the assortativity metrics were calculated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the assortativity metrics */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm used to calculate the assortativity */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of assortativity metric (e.g., valence, degree) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assortativity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assortativity_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diameter" (
  "diameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diameter entry */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the network the diameter applies to */,
  "diameter_weighted" INTEGER /* Weighted diameter of the network */,
  "diameter_unweighted" INTEGER /* Unweighted diameter of the network */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the diameter metrics were calculated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the diameter metrics */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm used to calculate the diameter */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of diameter metric (e.g., weighted, unweighted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diameter_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id")
)
